dedupMerged: UX-011 + UX-034 (CCCD fields not rendered in customer form)

gaps: PO-019: no outstanding-balance badge in customer list
PO-004: bill doesn't reflect post-create services
PO-019: no aggregate at customer level
PO-008: pipeline chart conflates billed vs collected
PO-003: next-owner not on info tab

criticalFindings.title: AppShell h-screen breaks mobile Safari and traps focus in nested scrollers
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: Outer uses `flex h-screen overflow-hidden`; main uses `flex-1 overflow-y-auto`. Mobile Safari's 100vh includes URL bar, topbar overlaps content, sticky positioning unreliable, no global Back-to-top.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix:
Replace `h-screen` with `min-h-screen`. Keep header as `sticky top-0`. Move scroll to main with relative positioning. Pattern: `
{children}
`

criticalFindings.title: Customer form declares CCCD fields in defaultValues but never renders inputs — CCCD cannot be captured
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: defaultValues include nationalIdNumber, nationalIdIssueDate, nationalIdIssuePlace (lines 76-78) and Zod schema likely requires/validates them, but the JSX sections (lines 91-253) never render an input for these fields.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: Add a 'Giấy tờ tùy thân' form section between sections 2 and 3 rendering the three fields with Input + validation errors. Verify against lib/validators/customer.ts; if out-of-MVP, strip from defaults+schema.

criticalFindings.title: Status transition to procedure_completed has no second-confirm and pre-procedure checklist lacks clinical safety items
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: (1) StatusWorkflow confirms the transition but the parent does not re-confirm side effects (D1–D90 followups, auto-tasks). (2) evaluatePreProcedureChecklist checks only process items (lab done, doctor approved, reminder sent, hospital confirmed, nurse+CSKH assigned). No blood test, allergy, pregnancy, anesthesia history, fasting, medication review, treatment consent.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: (1) Add a panel inside ConfirmDialog for procedure_completed: 'Sẽ tạo 6 followups D1–D90 và N tasks tự động'. (2) Add required checklist items: blood_test_result_present, allergy_screening, pregnancy_test (where applicable), anesthesia_history, fasting_confirmed, treatment_consent_granted. Source from case/customer records.

criticalFindings.title: hospital_confirmed can transition to scheduled without doctor review or lab
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: CASE_STATUS_TRANSITIONS.hospital_confirmed = ['waiting_doctor_review', 'waiting_lab_test', 'scheduled']. The 'scheduled' branch lets a case jump to fully scheduled before any clinical clearance.
criticalFindings.medicalImpact: Patient could be admitted to OR and anesthetized without medical clearance (no doctor review, no lab results).
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: Remove 'scheduled' from hospital_confirmed transitions. Force path: hospital_confirmed → waiting_doctor_review → (lab) → medically_approved → scheduled.

criticalFindings.title: Case-status API only requires 'cases:write' — sales/accountant can transition into procedure_completed/medical_alert
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: requirePermission(request, 'cases:write'). 'cases:write' is granted to accountant, coordinator, master_sales, sales_online, sales_offline. CASE_STATUS_CHANGE_ROLES in constants/permissions.ts:79-88 is defined but never consulted by the API.
criticalFindings.medicalImpact: Non-clinical roles can move a case into procedure_completed/medical_alert/complaint, bypassing clinical workflow. Liability exposure.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: Read CASE_STATUS_CHANGE_ROLES from constants/permissions.ts and verify user.role is in it. For medical_alert/complaint additionally require CASE_MEDICAL_DECISION_ROLES (admin, cso, doctor).

criticalFindings.title: Accountant has full payment SoD break — can create AND confirm own payments
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: PAYMENT_CONFIRM_ROLES = ['admin', 'accountant']. PAYMENT_CREATE_ROLES includes accountant. Accountant can both create and confirm.
criticalFindings.medicalImpact: Financial fraud risk; revenue reports cannot separate enterer vs confirmer; medical-resource decisions based on contaminated data.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: Remove 'accountant' from PAYMENT_CONFIRM_ROLES, OR enforce server-side 'createdBy !== confirmedBy' check in confirmPayment. Add audit log on confirmPayment (currently missing).

criticalFindings.title: No 'lab overdue by N days' indicator on dashboard
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: Dashboard's quick cards show only 4 generic counts. No surface computes `today − expectedLabDate` for cases in waiting_lab_test/scheduled/in_procedure/waiting_doctor_review.
criticalFindings.businessImpact: Doctors/coordinators don't see overdue labs; surgery cancellations, OR waste, reputation damage. ~2–3 cancellations/month ≈ 50–150M VND lost revenue.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: Add `lab_overdue_count` derived stat. Render red StatCard on dashboard + sortable 'Lab trễ N ngày' column on case list. Click → filtered list of overdue cases.

criticalFindings.title: Payment confirm + recalc race condition — amountPaid can drift on concurrent confirms
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: recalculateCasePayment sums confirmed, subtracts refunds. rejectPayment doesn't re-reconcile. No transaction wrapping confirm + recalc.
criticalFindings.businessImpact: Confirmed revenue is the cash-in number for reports. Race overwrites amountPaid with stale data; month-end revenue off by tens of millions VND.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: Wrap confirmPayment + recalculateCasePayment in Firestore transaction or Cloud Function. Add defensive check rejecting confirmation if amountPaid would drop below refund total.

criticalFindings.title: Case detail does not surface 'next owner' on Info tab
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: Info card shows static facts. Staff ownership lives only in dedicated 'Phân công' tab. Cannot see in ≤2 clicks who owns the next required action based on current status.
criticalFindings.businessImpact: Every status transition leaves next step unowned. ~3 min/case × 50 cases/day = 2.5 hours/day of Zalo chasing ownership.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: On Info tab, compute 'Bước tiếp theo: <staff name>' from CASE_STATUS_TRANSITIONS[currentStatus] → required role mapping. Prominent banner at top.

criticalFindings.title: Pre-procedure checklist does not block transitions when clinical items are missing
criticalFindings.currentBehavior: ChecklistPanel shows progress + 'Đạt yêu cầu / Chưa đạt' badge but never interacts with StatusWorkflow to gate transitions. StatusWorkflow renders all allowed transitions regardless of checklist.allPassed.
criticalFindings.medicalImpact: A patient with checklist.allPassed=false can still be transitioned to checked_in/in_procedure/procedure_completed. Checklist is decorative, not a gate — last defensive layer missing.
criticalFindings.recommendedFix: In StatusWorkflow, for transitions to checked_in/in_procedure/medically_approved, call evaluatePreProcedureChecklist and disable button when required items not all passed, with tooltip explaining which item is missing.

highFindings.title: Topbar 'Thông tin cá nhân' button has no onClick handler
highFindings.fix: Implement /settings/profile route or remove entry. If kept, add onClick to toast 'Đang phát triển'.

highFindings.title: Sidebar & MobileNav duplicate menu config — drift risk
highFindings.fix: Extract to src/config/sidebar-menu.ts. Share useVisibleMenu(role) hook.

highFindings.title: Notification bell caps at 10 items, silent truncation
highFindings.fix: Replace slice(0,10) with stateful paging; collapse read items by default with 'Hiển thị đã đọc' toggle.

highFindings.title: Case detail hand-rolls tabs instead of using shared <Tabs>
highFindings.fix: Use <Tabs> from @/components/ui/tabs; wrap in overflow-x-auto.

highFindings.title: StatusWorkflow shows generic message when no transitions exist
highFindings.fix: Add per-terminal-status copy; distinguish role-denied vs no-edge.

highFindings.title: Followups empty-state has no CTA nor explanation of auto-create
highFindings.fix: Add CTA 'Xem case đã hoàn thành →' + footnote about D1–D90 auto-create.

highFindings.title: Media-library hardcodes case-001/cus-001 for uploads
highFindings.fix: Add case/customer picker modal before upload; or disable upload from media-library (only per-case from case detail).

highFindings.title: Case form uses raw numeric inputs for discount and amountPaid — no VND format
highFindings.fix: Build <CurrencyInput> with formatted VND preview ('5,000,000 đ'). Add warning if finalPrice > listedPrice with discountType='none'.

highFindings.title: Customer list shows duplicate empty state
highFindings.fix: Pass emptyMessage={null} to DataTable; keep rich empty Card with CTA.

highFindings.title: Notification click silently swallows failures and marks read on error
highFindings.fix: Revert local state on error; skip optimistic update; disabled while in-flight; fix hardcoded 'user-001'.

highFindings.title: Tabs component lacks ARIA roles, arrow-key navigation, home/end
highFindings.fix: Add role=tablist/tab, aria-selected, tabIndex, onKeyDown for ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End. WAI-ARIA tabs pattern.

highFindings.title: Modal has no focus trap, no focus return, no aria-labelledby
highFindings.fix: Add aria-labelledby; focus first focusable on open; trap focus; return focus to trigger on close.

highFindings.title: Customer deletion request dialog variant 'warning' but is informational action
highFindings.fix: Use 'info' variant or 'default' for request dialog; introduce 'info' variant in confirm-dialog.

highFindings.title: Attachment-list dropdown shows 5 visibility options + delete in one menu
highFindings.fix: Group by 'Hành động' / 'Quyền xem'; collapse visibility-chooser into inline segmented control.

highFindings.title: Modal close button uses X icon but no visible label for keyboard users
highFindings.fix: Adopt CloseIconButton pattern with consistent ariaLabel='Đóng' across modals.

highFindings.title: Followup card timeline line is purely decorative; no semantic progress
highFindings.fix: Color segments per status (red=overdue, amber=today, gray=pending, green=done). Sticky summary header with anchor links.

highFindings.title: Payment-list 'Người nhập' column shows raw user ID
highFindings.fix: Load getAllUsers, build usersMap, render displayName. Same for confirmedBy.

highFindings.title: Reports date filter doesn't refetch — silently shows stale data
highFindings.fix: Add useEffect on dateRange triggering loading state; or move data load to SWR hook depending on filters. Show 'Đang lọc…' pill.

highFindings.title: medical_alert can revert to procedure_completed, hiding unresolved clinical flags
highFindings.fix: Remove 'completed' from medical_alert transitions. Require new 'medical_alert_resolved' status with required notes + required-actor.

highFindings.title: issue_reported followup never escalates to doctor
highFindings.fix: When updating followup with status=issue_reported OR painLevel≥4, auto-trigger triggerMedicalAlert. Add lib/followups/escalate.ts.

highFindings.title: complaint notification excludes doctor, nurse, postop roles
highFindings.fix: Include 'doctor' in triggerComplaint recipients. Add 'coordinator' when hospital liaison attributes present. Filter CCCD/address.

highFindings.title: Doctor approval transition does not record doctor identity on case
highFindings.fix: Add approvedByDoctorId?: string and medicalApprovedAt?: string to CaseRecord. Populate on medically_approved transition (require doctor role).

highFindings.title: Postop D1–D90 dueDate may be computed from scheduled-not-actual date
highFindings.fix: Force status API to require actualProcedureDate when transitioning procedure_completed. Use same value in client + API path (single fn).

highFindings.title: No expectedLabDate vs expectedProcedureDate ordering validation
highFindings.fix: Add refine: if both dates present, expectedLabDate must be <= expectedProcedureDate. Vietnamese error message.

highFindings.title: Attachment upload does not enforce consent linkage for image types
highFindings.fix: Server-side: when AttachmentType in {before_image, immediately_after_image, postop_*} AND visibility in {public_marketing, media_approved}, require consentRequired=true AND consentId must reference a 'granted' consent.

highFindings.title: Visibility change to public_marketing has no consent check
highFindings.fix: Before allowing public_marketing visibility, require a 'granted' marketing_usage consent for the customer. Warning modal showing consent record.

highFindings.title: Consent signedBy cleared but documentStoragePath optional
highFindings.fix: Make documentStoragePath required when transitioning to 'granted'. Add upload step in ConsentPanel that requires a signed PDF.

highFindings.title: BillSummary shows static totalBillAfterDiscount — doesn't include added services
highFindings.fix: After addCaseService/removeCaseService, recompute totalBillBeforeDiscount/AfterDiscount on parent case (transactional). Show 'Last updated by added service <date>'.

highFindings.title: Stat card 'Doanh thu tháng' is incompact, not annotated as confirmed-only
highFindings.fix: Tooltip 'Chỉ tính thanh toán confirmed' OR split into 2 stacked sub-rows 'Đã xác nhận 1.2B / Đang chờ 300M'.

highFindings.title: No aggregate '% cases with D1 completed' on dashboard
highFindings.fix: Compute d1_completion_rate. Render as 'Sức khỏe hậu phẫu' ring-stat last-30-day, red badge if <80%.

highFindings.title: No operational risk page: aggregated overdue (lab, payment, followup, complaint)
highFindings.fix: Build /operations page: 4 priority queues. Single-click triage. Defer after MVP happy-path locked.

highFindings.title: Pipeline category chart uses totalBillAfterDiscount as 'revenue' (includes unpaid)
highFindings.fix: Rename to 'Bill / Doanh thu tiềm năng' or restrict to confirmed revenue. Tooltip 'Tổng bill (chưa trừ pending)'.

highFindings.title: Revenue trend chart sums pending + confirmed without distinguishing; refund dropped
highFindings.fix: Annotate Y-axis clearly; add refund line in red; tooltip 'Đã xác nhận = confirmed − refund'.

highFindings.title: Reports have no CSV export — analyst workflow breaks
highFindings.fix: Add 'Xuất CSV' dropdown per chart. Wire reports:export permission to button visibility. Export is the in-memory data filtered by dateRange.

highFindings.title: Media Library page consumes engineering but is unused by core 10 questions
highFindings.fix: Remove /media-library from sidebar; keep attachments grid only on case detail. Defer to Phase 6 if Media team needs dedicated gallery.

mediumFindings.title: Case detail uses native confirm() for removing services
mediumFindings.fix: Replace with <ConfirmDialog variant='danger'>

mediumFindings.title: Calendar raw textarea + caseId fallback 'general' leads to 404
mediumFindings.fix: Use shared <Textarea>; require caseId; render special link for general.

mediumFindings.title: Customer modal size 'xl' but contains 22+ fields — scroll inside modal
mediumFindings.fix: Promote create/edit to dedicated route /customers/new, /customers/[id]/edit.

mediumFindings.title: Topbar polls notifications every 60s even when tab is hidden
mediumFindings.fix: Use visibilitychange to pause; or SWR/React-Query with refreshInterval. Add jitter.

mediumFindings.title: Filter selects in audit-logs/media-library reset search silently
mediumFindings.fix: Render active-filter chips with X icons. Add 'Xóa tất cả bộ lọc' button.

mediumFindings.title: Case list status filter chips are 12 options — no overflow on tablet
mediumFindings.fix: Replace with <Select> on mobile (md:hidden) and chips on desktop (hidden md:flex). Or scroll-snap.

mediumFindings.title: StatCards shows '...' then real value — flicker on dashboard first paint
mediumFindings.fix: Use skeleton cards matching stat size; cache previous value; aria-busy='true'.

mediumFindings.title: Customer/Case detail Timeline tab ships with 'đang phát triển' placeholder
mediumFindings.fix: Hide tab until implemented OR replace with real audit_logs view (recommend build real timeline — audit_logs already exist).

mediumFindings.title: ServiceRequestRow price inputs are uncontrolled — typing lag on large forms
mediumFindings.fix: Debounce numeric inputs 150ms; use uncontrolled inputs with refs; React.memo.

mediumFindings.title: Attachments grid in media-library has no visible loading skeleton
mediumFindings.fix: Render 8 skeleton cards matching exact size. Match grid-cols layout.

mediumFindings.title: Calendar 'create appointment' caseId is free-text — staff must know IDs
mediumFindings.fix: Convert to search-and-select dropdown matching caseCode/name/phone.

mediumFindings.title: Logout button no confirmation, easy mis-click on touch
mediumFindings.fix: Add useBeforeUnload + in-memory 'dirty form' context that shows confirm modal before logout if open form has unsaved edits.

mediumFindings.title: Case detail 7-tab row labels overflow on 360px mobile
mediumFindings.fix: Convert to icon-only tabs on mobile (sm:hidden). Use shared <Tabs>.

mediumFindings.title: CASE_STATUS_CHANGE_ROLES grants nurse+cskh_postop cancel authority despite comment
mediumFindings.fix: Split CASE_CANCEL_ROLES (already line 92) and enforce in API for transitions to cancelled/postponed.

mediumFindings.title: Coordinator sees no hospital-coordination panel in case detail
mediumFindings.fix: Add 'Hospital' tab in CaseDetail (visible to coordinator/cso/admin). Render HospitalCoordination toggles + timestamps.

mediumFindings.title: Customer deletion cascade deletes cases/payments/followups with no audit log
mediumFindings.fix: Wrap each cascade update in writeAuditLog with action 'customer_deleted' and entityType case/payment/followup.

mediumFindings.title: Audit log 'after' for sensitive fields includes medicalNote unfiltered
mediumFindings.fix: Redact medicalNote/privacyNote/CCCD from before/after diff before writeAuditLog.

mediumFindings.title: Nurse has attachments:write but typically shouldn't upload medical images
mediumFindings.fix: Restrict attachments:write for medical_image types to roles with medical gate. Sub-permission attachments:medical_upload.

mediumFindings.title: Followup notify hardcodes 'CSKH' as assigneeName regardless of actual staff
mediumFindings.fix: Read staffAssignment.cskhPostopId; resolve to displayName/uid via getAllUsers.

mediumFindings.title: lab_test_due event type defined but no trigger function exists
mediumFindings.fix: Either delete the unused event type OR implement triggerLabTestDue(caseRecord, expectedLabDate) on status move to waiting_lab_test.

mediumFindings.title: StaffAssignment UI shows displayName only — no role label
mediumFindings.fix: Render '[Role] Display Name' next to each assigned staff.

mediumFindings.title: Case list 'Nơi thực hiện' column truncates clinic names
mediumFindings.fix: Widen column to max-w-[180px]; add title tooltip with full string.

mediumFindings.title: expectedLabDate can be edited without regenerating lab_test appointment
mediumFindings.fix: On date change, prompt 'Đặt lại lịch hẹn xét nghiệm?' — opens Calendar modal pre-filled.

mediumFindings.title: PaymentList lacks search/filter by customer or case code
mediumFindings.fix: Add searchQuery prop filtering by customer name, case code, or note.

mediumFindings.title: Customer list has no payment-status badge — sales can't see who owes money
mediumFindings.fix: Add aggregated stat: sum of remainingAmount across all customer cases (active only). Red if >0.

mediumFindings.title: Sales/doctor/coordinator/CSKH share the same generic dashboard
mediumFindings.fix: Defer: add role-specific widgets incrementally after MVP happy-path locked.

lowFindings.title: ChecklistPanel does not block forward transitions when checklist fails
No clinic-hours / service price default settings wired into billing
lowFindings.fix: Defer to phase 6: add ClinicSettings entity (hours, defaultSurgeryDuration, defaultPaymentTerms).

lowFindings.title: Date range filter has only 3/6/12/all — no quarter / custom range
lowFindings.fix: Defer — add custom range + quarter toggle in phase 6 if asked.

lowFindings.title: Calendar 'Lịch hẹn sắp tới' shows only case link, not owner in grid
